34:17.qalun_text: Thus We repaid them on account of how they denied, and who is (thus) repaid except the staunch denier?
34:17.warsh_text: Thus We repaid them on account of how they denied, and who is (thus) repaid except the staunch denier?
34:17.qalun_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَيْنَٰهُم بِمَا كَفَرُواْۖ وَهَلْ يُجَٰزَىٰ إِلَّا اَ۬لْكَفُورُۖ
34:17.warsh_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَيْنَٰهُم بِمَا كَفَرُواْۖ وَهَلْ يُجَٰز۪ىٰٓ إِلَّا اَ۬لْكَفُورُۖ

34:20.base_text: And surely, Iblis confirmed his assumption about them. So they followed him, except for a group of believers.
34:20.qalun_text: And surely, Iblis's assumption about them was confirmed. So they followed him, except for a group of believers.
34:20.warsh_text: And surely, Iblis's assumption about them was confirmed. So they followed him, except for a group of believers.
34:20.qalun_ar_text: وَلَقَدْ صَدَقَ عَلَيْهِمْ إِبْلِيسُ ظَنَّهُۥ فَاتَّبَعُوهُ إِلَّا فَرِيقاٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لْمُؤْمِنِينَۖ
34:20.warsh_ar_text: وَلَقَدْ صَدَقَ عَلَيْهِمُۥٓ إِبْلِيسُ ظَنَّهُۥ فَاتَّبَعُوهُ إِلَّا فَرِيقاٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لْمُومِنِينَۖ

34:40.base_text: And on the day when He herds them all together, then says to the angels, “Is it you that these used to worship?”
34:40.qalun_text: And on the day when We herd them all together, then says to the angels, “Is it you that these used to worship?”
34:40.warsh_text: And on the day when We herd them all together, then says to the angels, “Is it you that these used to worship?”
34:40.qalun_ar_text: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُهُمْ جَمِيعاٗ ثُمَّ نَقُولُ لِلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ أَهَٰؤُلَآ۟ إِيَّاكُمْ كَانُواْ يَعْبُدُونَۖ
34:40.warsh_ar_text: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُهُمْ جَمِيعاٗ ثُمَّ نَقُولُ لِلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ أَهَٰٓؤُلَآءِ ايَّاكُمْ كَانُواْ يَعْبُدُونَۖ

35:40.base_text: Say, “Have you regarded those associates of yours that you worship apart from Allah? Show me what they have created on earth.” Or do they have any share in the heavens? Or have We given them a scripture such that they rely on an evident proof from it? Rather, the unjust promise one another nothing but a deception.
35:40.qalun_text: Say, “Have you regarded those associates of yours that you worship apart from Allah? Show me what they have created on earth.” Or do they have any share in the heavens? Or have We given them a scripture such that they rely on evident proofs from it? Rather, the unjust promise one another nothing but a deception.
35:40.warsh_text: Say, “Have you regarded those associates of yours that you worship apart from Allah? Show me what they have created on earth.” Or do they have any share in the heavens? Or have We given them a scripture such that they rely on evident proofs from it? Rather, the unjust promise one another nothing but a deception.
35:40.qalun_ar_text: قُلْ أَرَٰ۬يْتُمْ شُرَكَآءَكُمُ اُ۬لذِينَ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ اِ۬للَّهِ أَرُونِے مَاذَا خَلَقُواْ مِنَ اَ۬لْأَرْضِ أَمْ لَهُمْ شِرْكٞ فِے اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِۖ أَمْ ءَاتَيْنَٰهُمْ كِتَٰباٗ فَهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَٰتٖ مِّنْهُۖ بَلْ إِنْ يَّعِدُ اُ۬لظَّٰلِمُونَ بَعْضُهُم بَعْضاً إِلَّا غُرُوراًۖ
35:40.warsh_ar_text: قُلَ اَرَٰٓيْتُمْ شُرَكَآءَكُمُ اُ۬لذِينَ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ اِ۬للَّهِ أَرُونِے مَاذَا خَلَقُواْ مِنَ اَ۬لَارْضِ أَمْ لَهُمْ شِرْكٞ فِے اِ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِۖ أَمَ اٰتَيْنَٰهُمْ كِتَٰباٗ فَهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَٰتٖ مِّنْهُۖ بَلِ اِنْ يَّعِدُ اُ۬لظَّٰلِمُونَ بَعْضُهُم بَعْضاً اِلَّا غُرُوراًۖ

36:5.base_text: (God bestowed it as) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,
36:5.qalun_text: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,
36:5.warsh_text: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

36:32.base_text: And none of them but will be arraigned before Us, all together.
36:32.qalun_text: And all of them, all together, will be arraigned before Us.
36:32.warsh_text: And all of them, all together, will be arraigned before Us.
36:32.qalun_ar_text: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَۖ
36:32.warsh_ar_text: وَإِن كُلّٞ لَّمَا جَمِيعٞ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَۖ

36:39.base_text: And We have determined the moon in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.
36:39.qalun_text: And the moon: We have determined it in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.
36:39.warsh_text: And the moon: We have determined it in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.
36:39.qalun_ar_text: وَالْقَمَرُ قَدَّرْنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَالْعُرْجُونِ اِ۬لْقَدِيمِۖ
36:39.warsh_ar_text: وَالْقَمَرُ قَدَّرْنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَالْعُرْجُونِ اِ۬لْقَدِيمِۖ

36:41.base_text: And a sign for them is that We carried their offspring in the laden ship,
36:41.qalun_text: And a sign for them is that We carried their offspring(s) in the laden ship,
36:41.warsh_text: And a sign for them is that We carried their offspring(s) in the laden ship,
36:41.qalun_ar_text: وَءَايَةٞ لَّهُمْ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمْ فِے اِ۬لْفُلْكِ اِ۬لْمَشْحُونِ
36:41.warsh_ar_text: وَءَايَةٞ لَّهُمُۥٓ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمْ فِے اِ۬لْفُلْكِ اِ۬لْمَشْحُونِ

36:68.base_text: And to whomever We give long life, We reverse his development—so will they not reason?
36:68.qalun_text: And to whomever We give long life, We reverse his development—so will youpl not reason?
36:68.warsh_text: And to whomever We give long life, We reverse his development—so will youpl not reason?
36:68.qalun_ar_text: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نَنكُسْهُ فِے اِ۬لْخَلْقِۖ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَۖ
36:68.warsh_ar_text: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نَنكُسْهُ فِے اِ۬لْخَلْقِۖ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَۖ

36:70.base_text: so that it may forewarn whoever is alive, and so that God’s decree may be deserved by the deniers.
36:70.qalun_text: so that yousg may forewarn whoever is alive, and so that God’s decree may be deserved by the deniers.
36:70.warsh_text: so that yousg may forewarn whoever is alive, and so that God’s decree may be deserved by the deniers.
36:70.qalun_ar_text: لِّتُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيّاٗ وَيَحِقَّ اَ۬لْقَوْلُ عَلَى اَ۬لْكَٰفِرِينَۖ
36:70.warsh_ar_text: لِّتُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيّاٗ وَيَحِقَّ اَ۬لْقَوْلُ عَلَى اَ۬لْكٰ۪فِرِينَۖ

37:6.base_text: Indeed, We have adorned the lowest heaven with an adornment, the planets,
37:6.qalun_text: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven with the adornment of planets,
37:6.warsh_text: Indeed, We have adorned the lower heaven with the adornment of planets,
37:6.qalun_ar_text: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا اَ۬لسَّمَآءَ اَ۬لدُّنْيَا بِزِينَةِ اِ۬لْكَوَاكِبِۖ
37:6.warsh_ar_text: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا اَ۬لسَّمَآءَ اَ۬لدُّنْي۪ا بِزِينَةِ اِ۬لْكَوَاكِبِۖ

37:8.base_text: They cannot eavesdrop on the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—
37:8.qalun_text: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—
37:8.warsh_text: They cannot hear the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—
37:8.qalun_ar_text: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ إِلَى اَ۬لْمَلَإِ اِ۬لْأَعْلَىٰ وَيُقْذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖۖ
37:8.warsh_ar_text: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ إِلَى اَ۬لْمَلَإِ اِ۬لَاعْل۪ىٰ وَيُقْذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٖۖ

37:16.base_text: Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones, can it be that we will really be resurrected?
37:16.qalun_text: Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones we will really be resurrected?
37:16.warsh_text: Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones we will really be resurrected?
37:16.qalun_ar_text: أَٰ۟ذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَاباٗ وَعِظَٰماً إِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
37:16.warsh_ar_text: اَ۟ذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَاباٗ وَعِظَٰماً اِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ

37:53.base_text: Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones, can it be that we will really be called to account?’”
37:53.qalun_text: Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones we will really be called to account?’”
37:53.warsh_text: Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones we will really be called to account?’”

38:46.base_text: Surely We distinguished them with a distinct quality—the remembrance of the )final( Home.
38:46.qalun_text: Surely We distinguished them with the distinct quality of the remembrance of the )final( Home.
38:46.warsh_text: Surely We distinguished them with the distinct quality of the remembrance of the )final( Home.

38:64.base_text: Did we take them with mockery, or have our sight(s) swerved from them?
38:64.qalun_text: Did we abuse them, or have our sight(s) swerved from them?
38:64.warsh_text: Did we abuse them, or have our sight(s) swerved from them?
38:64.qalun_ar_text: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقّٞ تَخَاصُمُ أَهْلِ اِ۬لنَّارِۖ
38:64.warsh_ar_text: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقّٞ تَخَاصُمُ أَهْلِ اِ۬لنّ۪ارِۖ

38:85.base_text: He said, “So the truth is—and only the truth I say—
38:85.qalun_text: He said, “So (by) the truth—and only the truth I say—
38:85.warsh_text: He said, “So (by) the truth—and only the truth I say—
38:85.qalun_ar_text: ۞ قَالَ فَالْحَقَّ وَالْحَقَّ أَقُولُۖ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَۖ
38:85.warsh_ar_text: ۞ قَالَ فَالْحَقَّ وَالْحَقَّ أَقُولُۖ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَۖ

39:9.base_text: Or what about one who worships devoutly during the watches of the night, prostrating himself and standing up, wary of the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord? Saysg, “Are those who know and those who do not know equal?” Indeed, only those endowed with understanding remind themselves.
39:9.qalun_text: What about one who worships devoutly during the watches of the night, prostrating himself and standing up, wary of the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord? Saysg, “Are those who know and those who do not know equal?” Indeed, only those endowed with understanding remind themselves.
39:9.warsh_text: What about one who worships devoutly during the watches of the night, prostrating himself and standing up, wary of the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord? Saysg, “Are those who know and those who do not know equal?” Indeed, only those endowed with understanding remind themselves.
39:9.qalun_ar_text: أَمَنْ هُوَ قَٰنِتٌ ءَانَآءَ اَ۬ليْلِ سَاجِداٗ وَقَآئِماٗ يَحْذَرُ اُ۬لْأٓخِرَةَ وَيَرْجُواْ رَحْمَةَ رَبِّهِۦۖ قُلْ هَلْ يَسْتَوِے اِ۬لذِينَ يَعْلَمُونَ وَالذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَۖ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُوْلُواْ اُ۬لْأَلْبَٰبِۖ
39:9.warsh_ar_text: أَمَنْ هُوَ قَٰنِتٌ اٰنَآءَ اَ۬ليْلِ سَاجِداٗ وَقَآئِماٗ يَحْذَرُ اُ۬لَاخِرَةَ وَيَرْجُواْ رَحْمَةَ رَبِّهِۦۖ قُلْ هَلْ يَسْتَوِے اِ۬لذِينَ يَعْلَمُونَ وَالذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَۖ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُوْلُواْ اُ۬لَالْبَٰبِۖ

39:71.base_text: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.
39:71.qalun_text: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.
39:71.warsh_text: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.
39:71.qalun_ar_text: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لذِينَ كَفَرُواْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَراًۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا فُتِّحَتْ أَبْوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَا أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمْ يَتْلُونَ عَلَيْكُمْ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمْ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمْ لِقَآءَ يَوْمِكُمْ هَٰذَاۖ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنْ حَقَّتْ كَلِمَةُ اُ۬لْعَذَابِ عَلَى اَ۬لْكَٰفِرِينَۖ
39:71.warsh_ar_text: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَراًۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا فُتِّحَتَ اَبْوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمْ يَاتِكُمْ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمْ يَتْلُونَ عَلَيْكُمُۥٓ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمْ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمْ لِقَآءَ يَوْمِكُمْ هَٰذَاۖ قَالُواْ بَل۪ىٰ وَلَٰكِنْ حَقَّتْ كَلِمَةُ اُ۬لْعَذَابِ عَلَى اَ۬لْكٰ۪فِرِينَۖ

39:73.base_text: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”
39:73.qalun_text: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”
39:73.warsh_text: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”
39:73.qalun_ar_text: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لذِينَ اَ۪تَّقَوْاْ رَبَّهُمْ إِلَى اَ۬لْجَنَّةِ زُمَراًۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِّحَتْ أَبْوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيْكُمْ طِبْتُمْ فَادْخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَۖ
39:73.warsh_ar_text: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لذِينَ اَ۪تَّقَوْاْ رَبَّهُمُۥٓ إِلَى اَ۬لْجَنَّةِ زُمَراًۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِّحَتَ اَبْوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيْكُمْ طِبْتُمْ فَادْخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَۖ

40:6.base_text: Thus yoursg Lord’s Word came true against those who denied: that they are the fellows of the Fire.
40:6.qalun_text: Thus yoursg Lord’s Words came true against those who denied: that they are the fellows of the Fire.
40:6.warsh_text: Thus yoursg Lord’s Words came true against those who denied: that they are the fellows of the Fire.
40:6.qalun_ar_text: وَكَذَٰلِكَ حَقَّتْ كَلِمَٰتُ رَبِّكَ عَلَى اَ۬لذِينَ كَفَرُواْ أَنَّهُمْ أَصْحَٰبُ اُ۬لنَّارِۖ
40:6.warsh_ar_text: وَكَذَٰلِكَ حَقَّتْ كَلِمَٰتُ رَبِّكَ عَلَى اَ۬لذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ أَنَّهُمُۥٓ أَصْحَٰبُ اُ۬لنّ۪ارِۖ

40:20.base_text: And Allah decrees with the truth, while those whom they call upon apart from Him do not decree at all. Indeed, it is Allah who is the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing.
40:20.qalun_text: And Allah decrees with the truth, while those whom you call upon apart from Him do not decree at all. Indeed, it is Allah who is the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing.
40:20.warsh_text: And Allah decrees with the truth, while those whom you call upon apart from Him do not decree at all. Indeed, it is Allah who is the All-Hearing, the All-Seeing.
40:20.qalun_ar_text: وَاللَّهُ يَقْضِے بِالْحَقِّۖ وَالذِينَ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِۦ لَا يَقْضُونَ بِشَےْءٍۖ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ هُوَ اَ۬لسَّمِيعُ اُ۬لْبَصِيرُۖ
40:20.warsh_ar_text: وَاللَّهُ يَقْضِے بِالْحَقِّۖ وَالذِينَ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِۦ لَا يَقْضُونَ بِشَےْءٍۖ اِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ هُوَ اَ۬لسَّمِيعُ اُ۬لْبَصِيرُۖ

40:37.base_text: the means of the heavens, so that I may view the God of Moses, though I surely think he is a liar.” And thus Pharaoh’s evil deeds were adorned for him and he was barred from the way, for Pharaoh’s plotting is in nothing but ruin.
40:37.qalun_text: . . . and he barred (others) from the way . . .
40:37.warsh_text: . . . and he barred (others) from the way . . .
40:37.qalun_ar_text: أَسْبَٰبَ اَ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ فَأَطَّلِعُ إِلَىٰ إِلَٰهِ مُوسَىٰ وَإِنِّے لَأَظُنُّهُۥ كَٰذِباٗۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ زُيِّنَ لِفِرْعَوْنَ سُوٓءُ عَمَلِهِۦ وَصَدَّ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّبِيلِۖ وَمَا كَيْدُ فِرْعَوْنَ إِلَّا فِے تَبَابٖۖ
40:37.warsh_ar_text: أَسْبَٰبَ اَ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ فَأَطَّلِعُ إِلَىٰٓ إِلَٰهِ مُوس۪ىٰ وَإِنِّے لَأَظُنُّهُۥ كَٰذِباٗۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ زُيِّنَ لِفِرْعَوْنَ سُوٓءُ عَمَلِهِۦ وَصَدَّ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّبِيلِۖ وَمَا كَيْدُ فِرْعَوْنَ إِلَّا فِے تَبَابٖۖ

40:58.base_text: And in no way are the blind and the seeing equal, nor are those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds (equal) to the evildoer. How little you remind yourselves!
40:58.qalun_ar_text: وَالذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَلَا اَ۬لْمُسِےٓءُۖ قَلِيلاٗ مَّا يَتَذَكَّرُونَۖ
40:58.warsh_ar_text: وَالذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَلَا اَ۬لْمُسِےٓءُۖ قَلِيلاٗ مَّا يَتَذَكَّرُونَۖ

41:19.base_text: And the day when Allah’s enemies are herded into the Fire in an organized manner—
41:19.qalun_text: And the day when We herd Allah’s enemies into the Fire . . .
41:19.warsh_text: And the day when We herd Allah’s enemies into the Fire . . .
41:19.qalun_ar_text: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ أَعْدَآءَ اَ۬للَّهِ إِلَى اَ۬لنَّارِ فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَۖ
41:19.warsh_ar_text: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ أَعْدَآءَ اَ۬للَّهِ إِلَى اَ۬لنّ۪ارِ فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَۖ

42:25.base_text: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what youpl dob;
42:25.qalun_text: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;
42:25.warsh_text: And it is He who accepts the repentance of His servants, and pardons evil deeds, and knows what they do;
42:25.qalun_ar_text: وَهْوَ اَ۬لذِے يَقْبَلُ اُ۬لتَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعْفُواْ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا يَفْعَلُونَۖ
42:25.warsh_ar_text: وَهُوَ اَ۬لذِے يَقْبَلُ اُ۬لتَّوْبَةَ عَنْ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَعْفُواْ عَنِ اِ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا يَفْعَلُونَۖ

42:33.base_text: If He wills, He can still the windc, leaving them motionless on its surface; indeed, in that are signs for everyone who is most patient, constantly thankful.
42:33.qalun_text: If He wills, He can still the winds, leaving them motionless on its surface; indeed, in that are signs for everyone who is most patient, constantly thankful.
42:33.warsh_text: If He wills, He can still the winds, leaving them motionless on its surface; indeed, in that are signs for everyone who is most patient, constantly thankful.
42:33.qalun_ar_text: وَمِنْ ءَايَٰتِهِ اِ۬لْجَوَارِۦ فِے اِ۬لْبَحْرِ كَالْأَعْلَٰمِۖ إِنْ يَّشَأْ يُسْكِنِ اِ۬لرِّيَٰحَ فَيَظْلَلْنَ رَوَاكِدَ عَلَىٰ ظَهْرِهِۦ إِنَّ فِے ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّكُلِّ صَبَّارٖ شَكُورٍ
42:33.warsh_ar_text: وَمِنَ اٰيَٰتِهِ اِ۬لْجَوَارِۦ فِے اِ۬لْبَحْرِ كَالَاعْلَٰمِۖ إِنْ يَّشَأْ يُسْكِنِ اِ۬لرِّيَٰحَ فَيَظْلَلْنَ رَوَاكِدَ عَلَىٰ ظَهْرِهِۦٓ إِنَّ فِے ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّكُلِّ صَبّ۪ارٖ شَكُورٍ

42:34-35.base_text: Or He can wreck them on account of what they have earned, yet He pardons much— 35 so that those who dispute Our signs may knowd that there is no escape for them.
42:34-35.qalun_text: Or He can wreck them on account of what they have earned, yet He pardons much. 35 Thus those who dispute Our signs know that there is no escape for them.
42:34-35.warsh_text: Or He can wreck them on account of what they have earned, yet He pardons much. 35 Thus those who dispute Our signs know that there is no escape for them.

42:51.base_text: And it is not for any human that Allah should speak to him except by revelation or from behind a veil or by sendingc a messenger to reveal by His permission whatever He wills; indeed, He is All-High, All-Wise.
42:51.qalun_text: And it is not for any human that Allah should speak to him except by revelation or from behind a veil, or He sends a messenger then reveals to him by His permission whatever He wills; indeed, He is All-High, All-Wise.
42:51.warsh_text: And it is not for any human that Allah should speak to him except by revelation or from behind a veil, or He sends a messenger then reveals to him by His permission whatever He wills; indeed, He is All-High, All-Wise.
42:51.qalun_ar_text: ۞ وَمَا كَانَ لِبَشَرٍ أَنْ يُّكَلِّمَهُ اُ۬للَّهُ إِلَّا وَحْياً أَوْ مِنْ وَّرَآءِےْ حِجَابٍ أَوْ يُرْسِلُ رَسُولاٗ فَيُوحِے بِإِذْنِهِۦ مَا يَشَآءُۖ اِ۪نَّهُۥ عَلِيٌّ حَكِيمٞۖ
42:51.warsh_ar_text: ۞ وَمَا كَانَ لِبَشَرٍ اَنْ يُّكَلِّمَهُ اُ۬للَّهُ إِلَّا وَحْياً اَوْ مِنْ وَّرَآءِےْ حِجَابٍ اَوْ يُرْسِلُ رَسُولاٗ فَيُوحِے بِإِذْنِهِۦ مَا يَشَآءُۖ اِ۪نَّهُۥ عَلِيٌّ حَكِيمٞۖ

43:5.base_text: So shall We ignore reminding youpl, for having beenb an extremist people?
43:5.qalun_text: So shall We ignore reminding youpl, if you have been an extremist people?
43:5.warsh_text: So shall We ignore reminding youpl, if you have been an extremist people?
43:5.qalun_ar_text: أَفَنَضْرِبُ عَنكُمُ اُ۬لذِّكْرَ صَفْحاً إِن كُنتُمْ قَوْماٗ مُّسْرِفِينَۖ
43:5.warsh_ar_text: اَفَنَضْرِبُ عَنكُمُ اُ۬لذِّكْرَ صَفْحاً اِن كُنتُمْ قَوْماٗ مُّسْرِفِينَۖ

43:10.base_text: He Who made the earth a cradlec for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.
43:10.qalun_text: He Who made the earth a resting place for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.
43:10.warsh_text: He Who made the earth a resting place for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.
43:10.qalun_ar_text: اُ۬لذِے جَعَلَ لَكُمُ اُ۬لْأَرْضَ مِهَٰداٗ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلاٗ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَۖ
43:10.warsh_ar_text: اُ۬لذِے جَعَلَ لَكُمُ اُ۬لَارْضَ مِهَٰداٗ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلاٗ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَۖ

43:18.base_text: (thinking) “What! Someone brought up f amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”
43:18.qalun_text: (thinking) “What! Someone growing up amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”
43:18.warsh_text: (thinking) “What! Someone growing up amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”
43:18.qalun_ar_text: أَوَمَنْ يَّنشَؤُاْ فِے اِ۬لْحِلْيَةِ وَهْوَ فِے اِ۬لْخِصَامِ غَيْرُ مُبِينٖۖ
43:18.warsh_ar_text: اَوَمَنْ يَّنشَؤُاْ فِے اِ۬لْحِلْيَةِ وَهُوَ فِے اِ۬لْخِصَامِ غَيْرُ مُبِينٖۖ

43:19.base_text: And they considered the angels, who are servantsh of the All-Merciful, to be females. Did they witnessi their creation? Their claim will be recorded and they will be asked.
43:19.qalun_text: And they considered the angels, who are with the All-Merciful, to be females. Were they made to witness their creation? Their claim will be recorded and they will be asked.
43:19.warsh_text: And they considered the angels, who are with the All-Merciful, to be females. Were they made to witness their creation? Their claim will be recorded and they will be asked.
43:19.qalun_ar_text: وَجَعَلُواْ اُ۬لْمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ اَ۬لذِينَ هُمْ عِندَ اَ۬لرَّحْمَٰنِ إِنَٰثاًۖ أَٰ۟شْهِدُواْ خَلْقَهُمْۖ سَتُكْتَبُ شَهَٰدَتُهُمْ وَيُسْـَٔلُونَۖ
43:19.warsh_ar_text: وَجَعَلُواْ اُ۬لْمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ اَ۬لذِينَ هُمْ عِندَ اَ۬لرَّحْمَٰنِ إِنَٰثاًۖ اَ۟شْهِدُواْ خَلْقَهُمْۖ سَتُكْتَبُ شَهَٰدَتُهُمْ وَيُسْـَٔلُونَۖ

43:24.base_text: He would sayc, “Even if Id have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”
43:24.qalun_text: Saysg, “Even if I have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”
43:24.warsh_text: Saysg, “Even if I have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”
43:24.qalun_ar_text: ۞ قُلْ أَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكُم بِأَهْدَىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمْ عَلَيْهِ ءَابَآءَكُمْۖ قَالُواْ إِنَّا بِمَا أُرْسِلْتُم بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَۖ
43:24.warsh_ar_text: ۞ قُلَ اَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكُم بِأَهْد۪ىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمْ عَلَيْهِ ءَابَآءَكُمْۖ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا بِمَآ أُرْسِلْتُم بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَۖ

43:35.base_text: and (golden) decorations. Yet all that is nothingh but the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).
43:35.qalun_text: and (golden) decorations. Indeed all that is merely the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).
43:35.warsh_text: and (golden) decorations. Indeed all that is merely the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).
43:35.qalun_ar_text: وَزُخْرُفاٗۖ وَإِن كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَا مَتَٰعُ اُ۬لْحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنْيَاۖ وَالْأٓخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُتَّقِينَۖ
43:35.warsh_ar_text: وَزُخْرُفاٗۖ وَإِن كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَا مَتَٰعُ اُ۬لْحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنْي۪اۖ وَالَاخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُتَّقِينَۖ

43:57.base_text: And when the son of Mary was set forth as an example, yoursg people promptly clappeda him
43:57.qalun_text: And when the son of Mary was set forth as an example, your pl people promptly barred (themselves and others) because of it
43:57.warsh_text: And when the son of Mary was set forth as an example, your pl people promptly barred (themselves and others) because of it
43:57.qalun_ar_text: وَلَمَّا ضُرِبَ اَ۪بْنُ مَرْيَمَ مَثَلاً إِذَا قَوْمُكَ مِنْهُ يَصُدُّونَۖ
43:57.warsh_ar_text: وَلَمَّا ضُرِبَ اَ۪بْنُ مَرْيَمَ مَثَلاً اِذَا قَوْمُكَ مِنْهُ يَصُدُّونَۖ

43:89.base_text: Then grantsg them amnesty and say, “Peace.” For theye shall come to know.
43:89.qalun_text: Then grantsg them amnesty and say, “Peace.” For youpl shall come to know.
43:89.warsh_text: Then grantsg them amnesty and say, “Peace.” For youpl shall come to know.
43:89.qalun_ar_text: فَاصْفَحْ عَنْهُمْ وَقُلْ سَلَٰمٞۖ فَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَۖ
43:89.warsh_ar_text: فَاصْفَحْ عَنْهُمْ وَقُلْ سَلَٰمٞۖ فَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَۖ

44:7.base_text: (from the) Lordg of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.
44:7.qalun_text: (He is the) Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.
44:7.warsh_text: (He is the) Lord of the heavens and the earth and what is between them, if youpl (can ever) believe with certitude.
44:7.qalun_ar_text: رَبُّ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَۖ
44:7.warsh_ar_text: رَبُّ اُ۬لسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَالَارْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَۖ

44:43-45.base_text: Indeed, the Tree of Zaqqumb 44 is the food of the sinful one, 45 like molten brass boilingc in the bellies
44:43-45.qalun_text: Indeed, the tree of Zaqqum is the food of the sinful one— 45 like molten brass—boiling in the bellies
44:43-45.warsh_text: Indeed, the tree of Zaqqum is the food of the sinful one— 45 like molten brass—boiling in the bellies

45:11.base_text: This is guidance, but those who have denied their Lord’s signs—for them is a painful punishment of torment.
45:11.qalun_text: This is guidance, but those who have denied their Lord’s signs—for them is a punishment of a painful torment.
45:11.warsh_text: This is guidance, but those who have denied their Lord’s signs—for them is a punishment of a painful torment.
45:11.qalun_ar_text: هَٰذَا هُدىٗۖ وَالذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ لَهُمْ عَذَابٞ مِّن رِّجْزٍ أَلِيمٍۖ
45:11.warsh_ar_text: هَٰذَا هُدىٗۖ وَالذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ لَهُمْ عَذَابٞ مِّن رِّجْزٍ اَلِيمٍۖ

45:21.base_text: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as equal to those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds, whether in their life or their death? Miserable is their judgment!
45:21.qalun_text: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!
45:21.warsh_text: Or do those who have perpetrated evil deeds assume that We will make them as those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds? Equal is their life or their death; miserable is their judgment!
45:21.qalun_ar_text: أَمْ حَسِبَ اَ۬لذِينَ اَ۪جْتَرَحُواْ اُ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجْعَلَهُمْ كَالذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءٞ مَّحْيَاهُمْ وَمَمَاتُهُمْۖ سَآءَ مَا يَحْكُمُونَۖ
45:21.warsh_ar_text: أَمْ حَسِبَ اَ۬لذِينَ اَ۪جْتَرَحُواْ اُ۬لسَّيِّـَٔاتِ أَن نَّجْعَلَهُمْ كَالذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ سَوَآءٞ مَّحْي۪اهُمْ وَمَمَاتُهُمْۖ سَآءَ مَا يَحْكُمُونَۖ

45:24.base_text: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not remind yourselves?
45:24.qalun_text: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?
45:24.warsh_text: Have yousg seen the one who has taken his own whim as his god, and Allah has misguided him despite his knowledge, and has sealed his hearing and his heart, and has placed a veil over his sight? Who will guide him after Allah? Will you not constantly remind yourselves?
45:24.qalun_ar_text: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا اَ۬لدُّنْيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحْيَا وَمَا يُهْلِكُنَا إِلَّا اَ۬لدَّهْرُۖ وَمَا لَهُم بِذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍۖ إِنْ هُمْ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَۖ
45:24.warsh_ar_text: وَقَالُواْ مَا هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا اَ۬لدُّنْي۪ا نَمُوتُ وَنَحْي۪ا وَمَا يُهْلِكُنَآ إِلَّا اَ۬لدَّهْرُۖ وَمَا لَهُم بِذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍۖ اِنْ هُمُۥٓ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَۖ

46:12.base_text: And before it was the Scripture of Moses, a guide and a mercy. And this is a confirming Scripture in the Arabic tongue, that it may warn those who have done injustice, and as glad tidings for those who excel in doing good.
46:12.qalun_text: And before it was the Scripture of Moses, a guide and a mercy. And this is a confirming Scripture in the Arabic tongue, that you may warn those who have done injustice, and as glad tidings for those who excel in doing good.
46:12.warsh_text: And before it was the Scripture of Moses, a guide and a mercy. And this is a confirming Scripture in the Arabic tongue, that you may warn those who have done injustice, and as glad tidings for those who excel in doing good.
46:12.qalun_ar_text: وَمِن قَبْلِهِۦ كِتَٰبُ مُوسَىٰ إِمَاماٗ وَرَحْمَةٗۖ وَهَٰذَا كِتَٰبٞ مُّصَدِّقٞ لِّسَاناً عَرَبِيّاٗ لِّتُنذِرَ اَ۬لذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَبُشْرَىٰ لِلْمُحْسِنِينَۖ
46:12.warsh_ar_text: وَمِن قَبْلِهِۦ كِتَٰبُ مُوس۪ىٰٓ إِمَاماٗ وَرَحْمَةٗۖ وَهَٰذَا كِتَٰبٞ مُّصَدِّقٞ لِّسَاناً عَرَبِيّاٗ لِّتُنذِرَ اَ۬لذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ وَبُشْر۪ىٰ لِلْمُحْسِنِينَۖ

46:15.base_text: And We have enjoined upon man excelling in showing kindness to his parents; his mother carried him with difficulty and delivered him with difficulty; his carriage and weaning are thirty months. Until, when he has attained his full strength and has reached forty years, he says, “Lord, enable me to appreciate the blessings with which You have blessed me and my parents, and to do righteousness that well pleases You, and grant me righteousness in my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed I am of the Muslims.”
46:15.qalun_text: And We have enjoined upon man kindness to his parents; his mother carried him with difficulty and delivered him with difficulty; his carriage and weaning are thirty months. Until, when he has attained his full strength and has reached forty years, he says, “Lord, enable me to appreciate the blessings with which You have blessed me and my parents, and to do righteousness that well pleases You, and grant me righteousness in my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed I am of the Muslims.”
46:15.warsh_text: And We have enjoined upon man kindness to his parents; his mother carried him with difficulty and delivered him with difficulty; his carriage and weaning are thirty months. Until, when he has attained his full strength and has reached forty years, he says, “Lord, enable me to appreciate the blessings with which You have blessed me and my parents, and to do righteousness that well pleases You, and grant me righteousness in my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed I am of the Muslims.”

46:16.base_text: Those are the ones from whom We accept the best of what they have done and whose misdeeds We overlook ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.
46:16.qalun_text: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.
46:16.warsh_text: Those are the ones from whom the best of what they have done is bound to be accepted and whose misdeeds are bound to be overlooked ; (they are) among the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) —the promise of truth which they had been promised.
46:16.qalun_ar_text: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ اَ۬لذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ عَنْهُمْ أَحْسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ فِے أَصْحَٰبِ اِ۬لْجَنَّةِۖ وَعْدَ اَ۬لصِّدْقِ اِ۬لذِے كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَۖ
46:16.warsh_ar_text: أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ اَ۬لذِينَ يُتَقَبَّلُ عَنْهُمُۥٓ أَحْسَنُ مَا عَمِلُواْ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَن سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ فِےٓ أَصْحَٰبِ اِ۬لْجَنَّةِۖ وَعْدَ اَ۬لصِّدْقِ اِ۬لذِے كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَۖ

46:19.base_text: And for all, there are degrees according to what they have done, and that He may render to them in full (the reward) for their deeds, and they will not be dealt with unjustly.
46:19.qalun_text: And for all, there are degrees according to what they have done, and that We may render to them in full (the reward) for their deeds, and they will not be dealt with unjustly.
46:19.warsh_text: And for all, there are degrees according to what they have done, and that We may render to them in full (the reward) for their deeds, and they will not be dealt with unjustly.
46:19.qalun_ar_text: وَلِكُلّٖ دَرَجَٰتٞ مِّمَّا عَمِلُواْۖ وَلِنُوَفِّيَهُمْ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَۖ
46:19.warsh_ar_text: وَلِكُلّٖ دَرَجَٰتٞ مِّمَّا عَمِلُواْۖ وَلِنُوَفِّيَهُمُۥٓ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَۖ

46:25.base_text: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, nothing could be seen except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.
46:25.qalun_text: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, yousg could see nothing except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.
46:25.warsh_text: “destroying everything by the command of its Lord.” And when the morning came upon them, yousg could see nothing except their residences. Thus We repay the criminal people.
46:25.qalun_ar_text: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَےْءِۢ بِأَمْرِ رَبِّهَاۖ فَأَصْبَحُواْ لَا تَرَىٰ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنَهُمْۖ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِے اِ۬لْقَوْمَ اَ۬لْمُجْرِمِينَۖ
46:25.warsh_ar_text: تُدَمِّرُ كُلَّ شَےْءِۢ بِأَمْرِ رَبِّهَاۖ فَأَصْبَحُواْ لَا تَر۪ىٰٓ إِلَّا مَسَٰكِنَهُمْۖ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِے اِ۬لْقَوْمَ اَ۬لْمُجْرِمِينَۖ

47:4.base_text: Thus, when youpl encounter those who have denied, strike at their necks. Then when you have subjugated them, bind them firmly. Then either release them by grace or by ransom until war lays down its burdens. Had Allah willed, He could have defeated them Himself, but He thus tests some of you by means of others. As for those who were killed in the way of Allah, He will not let their deeds go to waste.
47:4.qalun_text: Thus, when youpl encounter those who have denied, strike at their necks. Then when you have subjugated them, bind them firmly. Then either release them by grace or by ransom until war lays down its burdens. Had Allah willed, He could have defeated them Himself, but He thus tests some of you by means of others. As for those who combated in the way of Allah, He will not let their deeds go to waste.
47:4.warsh_text: Thus, when youpl encounter those who have denied, strike at their necks. Then when you have subjugated them, bind them firmly. Then either release them by grace or by ransom until war lays down its burdens. Had Allah willed, He could have defeated them Himself, but He thus tests some of you by means of others. As for those who combated in the way of Allah, He will not let their deeds go to waste.

47:30.base_text: That is because they said to those who hated what Allah had bestowed from on high, “We will obey you in certain matters.” But Allah knows their secret exchanges.
47:30.qalun_text: That is because they said to those who hated what Allah had bestowed from on high, “We will obey you in certain matters.” But Allah knows their secrets.
47:30.warsh_text: That is because they said to those who hated what Allah had bestowed from on high, “We will obey you in certain matters.” But Allah knows their secrets.
47:30.qalun_ar_text: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَأَرَيْنَٰكَهُمْ فَلَعَرَفْتَهُم بِسِيمَٰهُمْۖ وَلَتَعْرِفَنَّهُمْ فِے لَحْنِ اِ۬لْقَوْلِۖ وَاللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ أَعْمَٰلَكُمْۖ
47:30.warsh_ar_text: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَأَرَيْنَٰكَهُمْ فَلَعَرَفْتَهُم بِسِيمٰ۪هُمْۖ وَلَتَعْرِفَنَّهُمْ فِے لَحْنِ اِ۬لْقَوْلِۖ وَاللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ أَعْمَٰلَكُمْۖ

48:10.base_text: Indeed, those who pledge allegiance to yousg are actually pledging allegiance to Allah: the hand of Allah is over their hands. So whoever reneges in fact reneges to his own detriment. And whoever fulfills what he has covenanted with Allah, then He will grant him a great reward.
48:10.qalun_text: Indeed, those who pledge allegiance to yousg are actually pledging allegiance to Allah: the hand of Allah is over their hands. So whoever reneges in fact reneges to his own detriment. And whoever fulfills what he has covenanted with Allah, then We will grant him a great reward.
48:10.warsh_text: Indeed, those who pledge allegiance to yousg are actually pledging allegiance to Allah: the hand of Allah is over their hands. So whoever reneges in fact reneges to his own detriment. And whoever fulfills what he has covenanted with Allah, then We will grant him a great reward.
48:10.qalun_ar_text: إِنَّ اَ۬لذِينَ يُبَايِعُونَكَ إِنَّمَا يُبَايِعُونَ اَ۬للَّهَۖ يَدُ اُ۬للَّهِ فَوْقَ أَيْدِيهِمْۖ فَمَن نَّكَثَ فَإِنَّمَا يَنكُثُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِۦۖ وَمَنْ أَوْفَىٰ بِمَا عَٰهَدَ عَلَيْهِ اِ۬للَّهَ فَسَنُؤْتِيهِ أَجْراً عَظِيماٗۖ
48:10.warsh_ar_text: اِنَّ اَ۬لذِينَ يُبَايِعُونَكَ إِنَّمَا يُبَايِعُونَ اَ۬للَّهَۖ يَدُ اُ۬للَّهِ فَوْقَ أَيْدِيهِمْۖ فَمَن نَّكَثَ فَإِنَّمَا يَنكُثُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِۦۖ وَمَنَ اَوْف۪ىٰ بِمَا عَٰهَدَ عَلَيْهِ اِ۬للَّهَ فَسَنُوتِيهِ أَجْراً عَظِيماٗۖ

48:17.base_text: There is no blame on the blind, nor any blame on the lame, nor any blame on the sick. And whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger—He will enter him into Gardens beneath which rivers flow. But whoever turns away—He will punish him with a painful punishment.
48:17.qalun_text: There is no blame on the blind, nor any blame on the lame, nor any blame on the sick. And whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger—We will enter him into Gardens beneath which rivers flow. But whoever turns away—We will punish him with a painful punishment.
48:17.warsh_text: There is no blame on the blind, nor any blame on the lame, nor any blame on the sick. And whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger—We will enter him into Gardens beneath which rivers flow. But whoever turns away—We will punish him with a painful punishment.
48:17.qalun_ar_text: لَّيْسَ عَلَى اَ۬لْأَعْمَىٰ حَرَجٞ وَلَا عَلَى اَ۬لْأَعْرَجِ حَرَجٞ وَلَا عَلَى اَ۬لْمَرِيضِ حَرَجٞۖ وَمَنْ يُّطِعِ اِ۬للَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ نُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّٰتٖ تَجْرِے مِن تَحْتِهَا اَ۬لْأَنْهَٰرُۖ وَمَنْ يَّتَوَلَّ نُعَذِّبْهُ عَذَاباً أَلِيماٗۖ
48:17.warsh_ar_text: لَّيْسَ عَلَى اَ۬لَاعْم۪ىٰ حَرَجٞ وَلَا عَلَى اَ۬لَاعْرَجِ حَرَجٞ وَلَا عَلَى اَ۬لْمَرِيضِ حَرَجٞۖ وَمَنْ يُّطِعِ اِ۬للَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ نُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّٰتٖ تَجْرِے مِن تَحْتِهَا اَ۬لَانْهَٰرُۖ وَمَنْ يَّتَوَلَّ نُعَذِّبْهُ عَذَاباً اَلِيماٗۖ

50:30.base_text: On the day when We say to Hell, “Are you full?” And it says, “Are there any more?”
50:30.qalun_text: On the day when He says to Hell, “Are you full?” And it says, “Are there any more?”
50:30.warsh_text: On the day when He says to Hell, “Are you full?” And it says, “Are there any more?”
50:30.qalun_ar_text: يَوْمَ يَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ اِ۪مْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٖۖ
50:30.warsh_ar_text: يَوْمَ يَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ اِ۪مْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٖۖ

50:40.base_text: And highly exaltsg Him with praise in the night and after prostrations.
50:40.qalun_text: And highly exaltsg Him with praise in the night and at the ends of prostrations.
50:40.warsh_text: And highly exaltsg Him with praise in the night and at the ends of prostrations.

50:44.base_text: The day the earth ruptures open from above them, letting them rush out; that is an easy exodus for Us.
50:44.qalun_text: The day the earth vigorously ruptures open from above them, letting them rush out; that is an easy exodus for Us.
50:44.warsh_text: The day the earth vigorously ruptures open from above them, letting them rush out; that is an easy exodus for Us.
50:44.qalun_ar_text: يَوْمَ تَشَّقَّقُ اُ۬لْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعاٗۖ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٞۖ
50:44.warsh_ar_text: يَوْمَ تَشَّقَّقُ اُ۬لَارْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعاٗۖ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٞۖ

51:49.base_text: And We created all things in pairs, that you may remind yourselves.
51:49.qalun_text: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.
51:49.warsh_text: And We created all things in pairs, that youpl may constantly remember.
51:49.qalun_ar_text: وَمِن كُلِّ شَےْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
51:49.warsh_ar_text: وَمِن كُلِّ شَےْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ

52:21.base_text: And those who attained faith and whose offspring followed them in faith—We have united them with their offspring, and We have not deprived them of anything of their work; every person is in pledge for what (deeds) he has earned.
52:21.qalun_text: And those who attained faith and whose offspring followed them in faith—We have united them with their offspring(s), and We have not deprived them of anything of their work; every person is in pledge for what (deeds) he has earned.
52:21.warsh_text: And those who attained faith and whose offspring followed them in faith—We have united them with their offspring(s), and We have not deprived them of anything of their work; every person is in pledge for what (deeds) he has earned.
52:21.qalun_ar_text: وَالذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَاتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمْ وَمَا أَلَتْنَٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَےْءٖۖ كُلُّ اُ۪مْرِےِٕۢ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٞۖ
52:21.warsh_ar_text: وَالذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَاتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَٰنٍ اَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنَٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَےْءٖۖ كُلُّ اُ۪مْرِےِٕۢ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٞۖ

52:28.base_text: Indeed, before this we used to pray to Him; indeed, He is the Fulfiller of promises, the Bestower of mercy.
52:28.qalun_text: Indeed, before this we used to pray to Him, for He is the Fulfiller of promises, the Bestower of mercy.
52:28.warsh_text: Indeed, before this we used to pray to Him, for He is the Fulfiller of promises, the Bestower of mercy.
52:28.qalun_ar_text: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ أَنَّهُۥ هُوَ اَ۬لْبَرُّ اُ۬لرَّحِيمُۖ
52:28.warsh_ar_text: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ أَنَّهُۥ هُوَ اَ۬لْبَرُّ اُ۬لرَّحِيمُۖ

55:22.base_text: From them come out pearls and corals.
55:22.qalun_text: From them are brought out pearls and corals.
55:22.warsh_text: From them are brought out pearls and corals.

56:19.base_text: causing them neither headache nor intoxication,
56:19.qalun_text: causing them no headache, and they are not intoxicated,
56:19.warsh_text: causing them no headache, and they are not intoxicated,

56:47.base_text: “Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones—can it be that we will really be resurrected?
56:47.qalun_text: “Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones we will really be resurrected?
56:47.warsh_text: “Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones we will really be resurrected?
56:47.qalun_ar_text: وَكَانُواْ يَقُولُونَ أَٰئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَاباٗ وَعِظَٰماً إِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
56:47.warsh_ar_text: وَكَانُواْ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَاباٗ وَعِظَٰماً اِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ

56:62.base_text: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would remind yourselves!
56:62.qalun_text: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!
56:62.warsh_text: and youpl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would constantly remember!
56:62.qalun_ar_text: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ اُ۬لنَّشْأَةَ اَ۬لْأُولَىٰۖ فَلَوْلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
56:62.warsh_ar_text: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ اُ۬لنَّشْأَةَ اَ۬لُاول۪ىٰۖ فَلَوْلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ

57:24.base_text: those who are miserly and command mankind to miserliness. And whoever turns away—indeed, it is Allah who is the Self-Sufficient, the Praiseworthy.
57:24.qalun_text: those who are miserly and command mankind to miserliness. And whoever turns away—indeed, Allah is the Self-Sufficient, the Praiseworthy.
57:24.warsh_text: those who are miserly and command mankind to miserliness. And whoever turns away—indeed, Allah is the Self-Sufficient, the Praiseworthy.
57:24.qalun_ar_text: اِ۬لذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ وَيَأْمُرُونَ اَ۬لنَّاسَ بِالْبُخْلِۖ وَمَنْ يَّتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ اَ۬لْغَنِيُّ اُ۬لْحَمِيدُۖ
57:24.warsh_ar_text: اِ۬لذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ وَيَامُرُونَ اَ۬لنَّاسَ بِالْبُخْلِۖ وَمَنْ يَّتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ اَ۬لْغَنِيُّ اُ۬لْحَمِيدُۖ

58:10.base_text: Indeed, (malicious) private conversations are from Satan, that those who have attained faith may be sad. But he cannot harm them at all except by Allah’s leave. And in Allah let the believers place their trust.
58:10.qalun_text: Indeed, (malicious) private conversations are from Satan, that he may make those who have attained faith sad. But he cannot harm them at all except by Allah’s leave. And in Allah let the believers place their trust.
58:10.warsh_text: Indeed, (malicious) private conversations are from Satan, that he may make those who have attained faith sad. But he cannot harm them at all except by Allah’s leave. And in Allah let the believers place their trust.
58:10.qalun_ar_text: إِنَّمَا اَ۬لنَّجْوَىٰ مِنَ اَ۬لشَّيْطَٰنِ لِيُحْزِنَ اَ۬لذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَلَيْسَ بِضَآرِّهِمْ شَئْاً إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ اِ۬للَّهِۖ وعَلَى اَ۬للَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ اِ۬لْمُؤْمِنُونَۖ
58:10.warsh_ar_text: إِنَّمَا اَ۬لنَّجْو۪ىٰ مِنَ اَ۬لشَّيْطَٰنِ لِيُحْزِنَ اَ۬لذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَلَيْسَ بِضَآرِّهِمْ شَئْاً اِلَّا بِإِذْنِ اِ۬للَّهِۖ وعَلَى اَ۬للَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ اِ۬لْمُومِنُونَۖ

58:11.base_text: O you who have attained faith, when you are told, “Make room for one another in assemblies,” then make room so that Allah makes room for you. And when you are told, “Arise,” then arise. Allah elevates by degrees those of you who have attained faith and those given knowledge. And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
58:11.qalun_text: O you who have attained faith, when you are told, “Make room for one another in the assembly,” then make room so that Allah makes room for you. And when you are told, “Arise,” then arise. Allah elevates by degrees those of you who have attained faith and those given knowledge. And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
58:11.warsh_text: O you who have attained faith, when you are told, “Make room for one another in the assembly,” then make room so that Allah makes room for you. And when you are told, “Arise,” then arise. Allah elevates by degrees those of you who have attained faith and those given knowledge. And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
58:11.qalun_ar_text: يَٰأَيُّهَا اَ۬لذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ إِذَا قِيلَ لَكُمْ تَفَسَّحُواْ فِے اِ۬لْمَجْلِسِ فَافْسَحُواْ يَفْسَحِ اِ۬للَّهُ لَكُمْۖ وَإِذَا قِيلَ اَ۟نشُزُواْ فَانشُزُواْ يَرْفَعِ اِ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمْ وَالذِينَ أُوتُواْ اُ۬لْعِلْمَ دَرَجَٰتٖۖ وَاللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞۖ
58:11.warsh_ar_text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا اَ۬لذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِذَا قِيلَ لَكُمْ تَفَسَّحُواْ فِے اِ۬لْمَجْلِسِ فَافْسَحُواْ يَفْسَحِ اِ۬للَّهُ لَكُمْۖ وَإِذَا قِيلَ اَ۟نشُزُواْ فَانشُزُواْ يَرْفَعِ اِ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمْ وَالذِينَ أُوتُواْ اُ۬لْعِلْمَ دَرَجَٰتٖۖ وَاللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞۖ

60:3.base_text: Day of Resurrection He will decide between you, for Allah is All-Seeing of what you do.
60:3.qalun_text: . . . on the Day of Resurrection a decision will be made between you . . .
60:3.warsh_text: . . . on the Day of Resurrection a decision will be made between you . . .
60:3.qalun_ar_text: لَن تَنفَعَكُمْ أَرْحَامُكُمْ وَلَا أَوْلَٰدُكُمْۖ يَوْمَ اَ۬لْقِيَٰمَةِ يُفْصَلُ بَيْنَكُمْۖ وَاللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٞۖ
60:3.warsh_ar_text: لَن تَنفَعَكُمُۥٓ أَرْحَامُكُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَٰدُكُمْۖ يَوْمَ اَ۬لْقِيَٰمَةِ يُفْصَلُ بَيْنَكُمْۖ وَاللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٞۖ

61:14.base_text: O you who have attained faith, be the supporters of Allah as Jesus, son of Mary, said to the disciples, “Who are my supporters towards Allah?” The disciples said, “We are the supporters of Allah.” Then a faction of the Children of Israel attained faith while another faction denied it, and We aided those who had attained faith against their enemy, so they came to prevail.
61:14.qalun_ar_text: يَٰأَيُّهَا اَ۬لذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ كُونُواْ أَنصَاراٗ لِّلهِ كَمَا قَالَ عِيسَى اَ۪بْنُ مَرْيَمَ لِلْحَوَارِيِّـۧنَ مَنْ أَنصَارِيَ إِلَى اَ۬للَّهِۖ قَالَ اَ۬لْحَوَارِيُّونَ نَحْنُ أَنصَارُ اُ۬للَّهِۖ فَـَٔامَنَت طَّآئِفَةٞ مِّنۢ بَنِے إِسْرَآءِيلَ وَكَفَرَت طَّآئِفَةٞۖ فَأَيَّدْنَا اَ۬لذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ عَلَىٰ عَدُوِّهِمْ فَأَصْبَحُواْ ظَٰهِرِينَۖ
61:14.warsh_ar_text: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا اَ۬لذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ كُونُوٓاْ أَنصَاراٗ لِّلهِ كَمَا قَالَ عِيسَى اَ۪بْنُ مَرْيَمَ لِلْحَوَارِيِّـۧنَ مَنَ اَنصَارِيَ إِلَى اَ۬للَّهِۖ قَالَ اَ۬لْحَوَارِيُّونَ نَحْنُ أَنصَارُ اُ۬للَّهِۖ فَـَٔامَنَت طَّآئِفَةٞ مِّنۢ بَنِےٓ إِسْرَآءِيلَ وَكَفَرَت طَّآئِفَةٞۖ فَأَيَّدْنَا اَ۬لذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ عَلَىٰ عَدُوِّهِمْ فَأَصْبَحُواْ ظَٰهِرِينَۖ

63:5.base_text: And when it is said to them, “Come, the Messenger of Allah will ask forgiveness for you,” they keep turning their heads aside and yousg see them turning away while acting arrogantly.
63:5.qalun_ar_text: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَعَالَوْاْ يَسْتَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ رَسُولُ اُ۬للَّهِ لَوَوْاْ رُءُوسَهُمْ وَرَأَيْتَهُمْ يَصُدُّونَ وَهُم مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَۖ
63:5.warsh_ar_text: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَعَالَوْاْ يَسْتَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ رَسُولُ اُ۬للَّهِ لَوَوْاْ رُءُوسَهُمْ وَرَأَيْتَهُمْ يَصُدُّونَ وَهُم مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَۖ

64:9.base_text: The day when He gathers youpl for the Day of Gathering—that is the Day of Mutual Loss and Gain. And whoever attains faith in Allah and acts righteously, He will remit his evil deeds and He will enter him into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding therein forever; that is the great triumph.
64:9.qalun_text: . . . We will remit his evil deeds and We will enter him into . . .
64:9.warsh_text: . . . We will remit his evil deeds and We will enter him into . . .
64:9.qalun_ar_text: يَوْمَ يَجْمَعُكُمْ لِيَوْمِ اِ۬لْجَمْعِ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ اُ۬لتَّغَابُنِۖ وَمَنْ يُّؤْمِنۢ بِاللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَٰلِحاٗ نُّكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِۦ وَنُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّٰتٖ تَجْرِے مِن تَحْتِهَا اَ۬لْأَنْهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا أَبَداٗۖ ذَٰلِكَ اَ۬لْفَوْزُ اُ۬لْعَظِيمُۖ
64:9.warsh_ar_text: يَوْمَ يَجْمَعُكُمْ لِيَوْمِ اِ۬لْجَمْعِ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ اُ۬لتَّغَابُنِۖ وَمَنْ يُّومِنۢ بِاللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَٰلِحاٗ نُّكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِۦ وَنُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّٰتٖ تَجْرِے مِن تَحْتِهَا اَ۬لَانْهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَداٗۖ ذَٰلِكَ اَ۬لْفَوْزُ اُ۬لْعَظِيمُۖ

65:11.base_text: a messenger who reads to you Allah’s signs, (which are) clarifying, in order to bring out those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds from darkness into light. And whoever believes in Allah and acts righteously— He will enter him into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding therein forever; Allah has surely given him an excellent provision.
65:11.qalun_text: a messenger who reads to you Allah’s signs, clarified, in order to bring out those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds from darkness into light. And whoever believes in Allah and acts righteously— We will enter him into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding therein forever; Allah has surely given him an excellent provision.
65:11.warsh_text: a messenger who reads to you Allah’s signs, clarified, in order to bring out those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds from darkness into light. And whoever believes in Allah and acts righteously— We will enter him into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding therein forever; Allah has surely given him an excellent provision.
65:11.qalun_ar_text: رَّسُولاٗ يَتْلُواْ عَلَيْكُمْ ءَايَٰتِ اِ۬للَّهِ مُبَيَّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخْرِجَ اَ۬لذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ مِنَ اَ۬لظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى اَ۬لنُّورِۖ وَمَنْ يُّؤْمِنۢ بِاللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَٰلِحاٗ نُّدْخِلْهُ جَنَّٰتٖ تَجْرِے مِن تَحْتِهَا اَ۬لْأَنْهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا أَبَداٗ قَدْ أَحْسَنَ اَ۬للَّهُ لَهُۥ رِزْقاًۖ
65:11.warsh_ar_text: رَّسُولاٗ يَتْلُواْ عَلَيْكُمُۥٓ ءَايَٰتِ اِ۬للَّهِ مُبَيَّنَٰتٖ لِّيُخْرِجَ اَ۬لذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَعَمِلُواْ اُ۬لصَّٰلِحَٰتِ مِنَ اَ۬لظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى اَ۬لنُّورِۖ وَمَنْ يُّومِنۢ بِاللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَٰلِحاٗ نُّدْخِلْهُ جَنَّٰتٖ تَجْرِے مِن تَحْتِهَا اَ۬لَانْهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَداٗ قَدَ اَحْسَنَ اَ۬للَّهُ لَهُۥ رِزْقاًۖ

66:12.base_text: And Mary, the daughter of Imran, who guarded her chastity, and so We breathed into her of Our Spirit, and she believed in her Lord’s Words and His Scriptures and was one of the devout.
66:12.qalun_text: And Mary, the daughter of Imran, who guarded her chastity, and so We breathed into her of Our Spirit, and she believed in her Lord’s Words and His Scripture and was one of the devout.
66:12.warsh_text: And Mary, the daughter of Imran, who guarded her chastity, and so We breathed into her of Our Spirit, and she believed in her Lord’s Words and His Scripture and was one of the devout.
66:12.qalun_ar_text: وَمَرْيَمَ اَ۪بْنَتَ عِمْرَٰنَ اَ۬لتِے أَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِنَا وَصَدَّقَتْ بِكَلِمَٰتِ رَبِّهَا وَكِتَٰبِهِۦ وَكَانَتْ مِنَ اَ۬لْقَٰنِتِينَۖ
66:12.warsh_ar_text: وَمَرْيَمَ اَ۪بْنَتَ عِمْرَٰنَ اَ۬لتِےٓ أَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِنَا وَصَدَّقَتْ بِكَلِمَٰتِ رَبِّهَا وَكِتَٰبِهِۦ وَكَانَتْ مِنَ اَ۬لْقَٰنِتِينَۖ

73:20.qalun_ar_text: ۞ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدْنَىٰ مِن ثُلُثَيِ اِ۬ليْلِ وَنِصْفِهِۦ وَثُلُثِهِۦ وَطَآئِفَةٞ مِّنَ اَ۬لذِينَ مَعَكَۖ وَاللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ اُ۬ليْلَ وَالنَّهَارَۖ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحْصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْۖ فَاقْرَءُواْ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ اَ۬لْقُرْءَانِۖ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرْضَىٰ وَءَاخَرُونَ يَضْرِبُونَ فِے اِ۬لْأَرْضِ يَبْتَغُونَ مِن فَضْلِ اِ۬للَّهِ وَءَاخَرُونَ يُقَٰتِلُونَ فِے سَبِيلِ اِ۬للَّهِۖ فَاقْرَءُواْ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنْهُۖ وَأَقِيمُواْ اُ۬لصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُواْ اُ۬لزَّكَوٰةَۖ وَأَقْرِضُواْ اُ۬للَّهَ قَرْضاً حَسَناٗۖ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُواْ لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنْ خَيْرٖ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ اَ۬للَّهِ هُوَ خَيْراٗ وَأَعْظَمَ أَجْراٗۖ وَاسْتَغْفِرُواْ اُ۬للَّهَۖ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ غَفُورٞ رَّحِيمُۢۖ
73:20.warsh_ar_text: ۞ اِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدْن۪ىٰ مِن ثُلُثَيِ اِ۬ليْلِ وَنِصْفِهِۦ وَثُلُثِهِۦ وَطَآئِفَةٞ مِّنَ اَ۬لذِينَ مَعَكَۖ وَاللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ اُ۬ليْلَ وَالنَّهَارَۖ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحْصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْۖ فَاقْرَءُواْ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ اَ۬لْقُرْءَانِۖ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرْض۪ىٰ وَءَاخَرُونَ يَضْرِبُونَ فِے اِ۬لَارْضِ يَبْتَغُونَ مِن فَضْلِ اِ۬للَّهِ وَءَاخَرُونَ يُقَٰتِلُونَ فِے سَبِيلِ اِ۬للَّهِۖ فَاقْرَءُواْ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنْهُۖ وَأَقِيمُواْ اُ۬لصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُواْ اُ۬لزَّكَوٰةَۖ وَأَقْرِضُواْ اُ۬للَّهَ قَرْضاً حَسَناٗۖ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُواْ لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنْ خَيْرٖ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ اَ۬للَّهِ هُوَ خَيْراٗ وَأَعْظَمَ أَجْراٗۖ وَاسْتَغْفِرُواْ اُ۬للَّهَۖ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ غَفُورٞ رَّحِيمٞۖ
